description: Master execution manifest mapping agents to documentation, dependencies, and execution order

phases.name: Foundation
phases.description: Database schema, configuration, and project setup

agents.name: Database Schema Agent
acceptance_criteria: All 22 tables created with correct columns
JSONB fields for flexible data storage

agents.name: Database Schema QA
validation_checklist: All foreign keys have corresponding indexes
No N+1 query risks in relationships

agents.name: Configuration QA
validation_checklist: All required variables have defaults or validation

phases.name: Backend Core
phases.description: Authentication, project service, job management, and API routes

agents.name: Project Service Agent
acceptance_criteria: Multi-field filtering (status, developer, emirate, price, date)

agents.name: Project Service QA
validation_checklist: All CRUD operations return correct responses
Search is performant with large datasets

agents.name: Job Manager Agent
acceptance_criteria: Progress tracking (total steps, completed steps, current step)
Error handling with retry (3 attempts, exponential backoff)

phases.name: Material Preparation
phases.description: PDF processing, image classification, watermark removal, floor plans, and optimization

agents.name: PDF Processor Agent
acceptance_criteria: Extract all images from PDF using PyMuPDF

agents.name: Image Classifier Agent
acceptance_criteria: Classify into 5 categories (interior, exterior, amenity, logo, other)
Apply category limits (10 interior, 10 exterior, 5 amenity, 3 logo)

agents.name: Watermark Agent
acceptance_criteria: Detect watermark presence using Claude Sonnet 4.5
Fallback to original if quality drops

agents.name: Floor Plan Agent
acceptance_criteria: Extract structured data (unit type, bedrooms, bathrooms, sqft)
Select highest quality per unit type

agents.name: Image Optimizer Agent
acceptance_criteria: Convert to WebP (85% quality) and JPG (90% fallback)
Dual-tier output: Tier 1 (original quality), Tier 2 (LLM-optimized 1568px max)

phases.name: Content Generation
phases.description: Text extraction, data structuring, content generation, and Google Sheets integration

agents.name: Text Extractor Agent
acceptance_criteria: Use pymupdf4llm (90% cost savings vs OCR)

agents.name: Data Structurer Agent
acceptance_criteria: Extract all core fields from markdown

agents.name: Content Generator Agent
acceptance_criteria: Load brand context from reference file
Prepend brand context to all prompts
Support 6 templates (Aggregators, OPR, MPP, ADOP, ADRE, Commercial)

agents.name: Sheets Manager Agent
acceptance_criteria: Map content fields to cells per template

phases.name: Frontend
phases.description: React application with all pages, components, and state management

phases.name: Integrations
phases.description: External service integrations (GCS, Sheets, Drive, Anthropic, OAuth)

phases.name: DevOps
phases.description: Docker, CI/CD, Cloud Run deployment, and monitoring

phases.name: Testing
phases.description: Comprehensive testing: unit, integration, E2E, performance, security
